headline: General Manager of AI Core at Nubank and former Hyperplane co-founder.
title: General Manager, AI
confidenceNote: Nubank, LinkedIn, podcast, and event sources consistently identify Rohan Ramanath as a Hyperplane co-founder now leading AI Core / AI product work at Nubank.
bioMarkdown: AI product and machine-learning leader at Nubank, where he works on AI Core strategy for credit, customer experience, and banking infrastructure. Previously co-founded Hyperplane, the AI-for-banks startup acquired by Nubank.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile lists AI product and machine-learning engineering work at Nubank and founder history at Hyperplane.

primary.label: Nubank AI strategy announcement
primary.note: Names Rohan Ramanath as General Manager of AI Core discussing Nubank's AI strategy.

primary.label: Nubank Hyperplane acquisition announcement
primary.note: Lists Rohan Ramanath as a Hyperplane co-founder in Nubank's acquisition announcement.

secondary.label: Nu Videocast episode
secondary.note: Episode description names CTO Eric Young and General Manager of AI Core Rohan Ramanath discussing AI strategy.

secondary.label: Latitud podcast
secondary.note: Interview with Hyperplane co-founder Rohan Ramanath on AI in banking.

secondary.label: AICamp NuSession
secondary.note: Speaker listing identifies him as General Manager of the AI division at Nu.

headline: Director of AI at Sagard working on AI adoption across investment and portfolio contexts.
title: Director of AI
confidenceNote: Sagard team, LinkedIn, Responsible Investment Report, Substack, and profile-directory sources align on Rohit Saha's Director of AI role in Toronto.
bioMarkdown: Director of AI at Sagard, focused on applying AI across investment, portfolio, and financial-services workflows. Useful match for conversations on AI adoption in regulated industries, portfolio enablement, and measuring practical AI impact.

primary.note: Public profile identifies Rohit Saha as Director of AI at Sagard in Toronto.

headline: Chief of Staff at Willow working on enterprise AI-agent control and governance.
title: Chief of Staff
confidenceNote: LinkedIn confirms the Chief of Staff at Willow role, and multiple Willow launch posts list Roi Galipapa as part of the team; public long-form bio detail is limited.
bioMarkdown: Chief of Staff at Willow, a startup building enterprise controls for AI agents. Relevant for conversations about agent rollout, governance, operational adoption, and the security gaps around fast-moving AI tooling.

headline: Co-founder of Introspection building tools for self-improving agent systems.
title: Founder
confidenceNote: Introspection blog, AI Engineer schedule, LinkedIn, and social/event sources consistently tie Roland Gavrilescu to Introspection and agent-reliability work.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder of Introspection, focused on diagnosing and improving AI-agent behavior after deployment. Previously worked on AI systems at xAI and Superhuman, making him a strong match for agent reliability, evals, and self-improving software discussions.

primary.note: Company blog lists Roland Gavrilescu as co-founder and describes Introspection's agent-diagnostics thesis.

headline: Co-founder and CEO of General Reasoning, focused on long-horizon reasoning and RL.
title: Co-founder & CEO
confidenceNote: Personal site, company pages, LinkedIn, X, and conference sources consistently identify Ross Taylor as General Reasoning's co-founder/CEO and former Meta AI reasoning lead.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and CEO of General Reasoning, building research and systems for long-horizon AI reasoning. Previously led reasoning work at Meta AI for Llama 2/3 and co-founded Papers with Code before its Meta acquisition.

headline: Co-founder and CEO of Fabrion building AI-native systems for industrial manufacturers.
title: Co-founder and CEO
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, Constellation Research, 8VC, and startup-tracker sources consistently identify Roy Ng as Fabrion's co-founder/CEO and describe Fabrion's industrial AI focus.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and CEO of Fabrion, building an AI-native platform for industrial manufacturers and complex value chains. Previously held senior operating roles across enterprise software and fintech, including Bond, FIS, Twilio, and Mapbox.
